items.title: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
items.dek: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
items.body: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
items.dek: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 and put on trial last year.
items.body: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 and put on trial last year.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korea detains dissident who fled China in rubber boat
items.dek: Dong Guangping, an activist and former police officer, spent hours at sea before reaching Korean waters.
items.body: Dong Guangping, an activist and former police officer, spent hours at sea before reaching Korean waters.
